title: penstemon eriantherus var. eriantherus
intro: Penstemon eriantherus var. eriantherus, also known as the Sierra beardtongue, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Penstemon eriantherus var. eriantherus include soothing sore throats, reducing inflammation, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infection. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
